claim_boundary: Python 3.11 Stage-A unittest-launcher recovery only; not model quality, binding, Kd, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, Top7500, or production promotion.

legacy_102_test_contract.invocation: cd LEGACY_ROOT; python -m unittest <exact thirteen tests/*.py relative paths> -v

minimal_causal_change.legacy_launcher_new: thirteen exact relative tests/*.py argv values after cd to LEGACY_ROOT
minimal_causal_change.legacy_launcher_old: thirteen absolute /data1/.../tests/test_*.py argv values interpreted as module names by Python 3.11
minimal_causal_change.technical_suite_launcher_new: two exact relative tests/*.py argv values after cd to V1.3.2 package root
minimal_causal_change.technical_suite_launcher_old: inherited absolute package-root test argv shape with the same Python 3.11 incompatibility
minimal_causal_change.scope: the two Stage-A unittest launchers only
